name: Shadow Work
overview: A battered wife who's lost her sense of self after years of domestic abuse finds hope when she escapes to a seaside house where women in similar situations help her rediscover her identity, but the home's hidden rules force her to confront painful truths in a heart-wrenching journey toward healing.

trailers.title: 「連続ドラマＷ　シャドウワーク」本予告解禁！【WOWOW】
